title: Tomato and basil soup
total_time: Prep: less than 30 mins, Cook: 10 to 30 mins
ingredients: 1kg/2lb 4oz mixed ripe tomatoes, roughly chopped, 3 garlic cloves, roughly chopped, 1 handful fresh basil leaves, plus extra to serve, 1 tbsp tomato purée, 4 tbsp olive oil, plus extra to serve, 400-600ml/14-21fl oz hot vegetable stock, salt and freshly ground black pepper, 2-3 tbsp caster sugar, to taste, 150ml/5fl oz double cream, plus extra to serve, 1 ciabatta loaf, thickly sliced, to serve
